mapper.select: SELECT id, task_no, task_code, task_name, biz_type, biz_no, idempotent_key, retry_count, next_retry_time, status, fail_reason, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM sys_task WHERE idempotent_key = #{idempotentKey} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_task SET status = 20, fail_reason = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE idempotent_key = #{idempotentKey} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_task SET status = 30, fail_reason = NULL, next_retry_time = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE idempotent_key = #{idempotentKey} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE sys_task SET status = 40, fail_reason = #{failReason}, retry_count = retry_count + 1, next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE idempotent_key = #{idempotentKey} AND is_deleted = 0
